tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Legend:(XX)palm mute

Intro:[ch]G[/ch]-[ch]F[/ch]--[ch]C[/ch]-Fii-[ch]G[/ch]-(XX)[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]F[/ch]

All (Palm Muted power chords)

[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
All the small things,true care,truth bring.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I'll take one lift your ride,best trip.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Always,I know,you'll be at my show.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Watching,Waiting,Comiserating.[/tab]

(chorus)
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Say it aint so,I will not go,[/tab]

turn the lights off,carry me home
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
na na na na na na na na na na na na na na[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
na na na na na na(2x)[/tab]

(2nd Intro)
[ch]C[/ch]-[ch]Fii[/ch]-[ch]Eii[/ch]-(XX)[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]F[/ch]

(all palm muted)
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Late night,come home.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Work sucks,I know.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
She left me roses by the stairs,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Surprises le'mme know she cares(chorus)[/tab]



(extra)
[ch]F[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]-[ch]C[/ch](4X)


(ending)

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Say it aint so,I will not go[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Turn the lights off carry me home.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
Keep your head still I'll be your thrill[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
The night will go on my little windmill[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
